blocks.body: Present Perfect Continuous: pytania i krótkie odpowiedzi — Have you been...?, Has she been...?, How long have they been...?

{"level":"A2–B1","intro":"W pytaniach w Present Perfect Continuous stawiamy have / has przed podmiotem, a potem używamy been + V-ing.","rules":[{"label":"Have I / you / we / they been ...?","color":"emerald","text":"Z tymi podmiotami zacznij pytanie od have.","example":"Have you been waiting long?"},{"label":"Has he / she / it been ...?","color":"blue","text":"Z he / she / it użyj has.","example":"Has she been working today?"},{"label":"How long ...?","color":"amber","text":"Pytania z How long są bardzo częste, gdy mówimy o długości trwania do teraz.","example":"How long have they been living here?"},{"label":"Short answers","color":"violet","text":"W krótkiej odpowiedzi powtórz have / has albo haven't / hasn't.","example":"Yes, I have. / No, she hasn't."}]}

{"title":"1. Podstawowe modele pytania","intro":"W pytaniu najpierw stoi have albo has, a potem been + V-ing.","items":[{"label":"I / you / we / they","title":"Have ... been + V-ing?","subtitle":"Have you been studying? / Have they been waiting long?"},{"label":"he / she / it","title":"Has ... been + V-ing?","subtitle":"Has he been working? / Has it been raining?"},{"label":"How long","title":"How long have / has ... been + V-ing?","subtitle":"How long have you been learning English?"},{"label":"Short answers","title":"Yes, ... have / has. No, ... haven't / hasn't.","subtitle":"Yes, I have. / No, he hasn't."}]}

{"title":"2. Do czego służą te pytania","sections":[{"label":"O długość trwania","color":"emerald","description":"Pytaj, jak długo czynność trwa do chwili obecnej.","examples":[{"en":"How long have you been waiting?","ua":"Pytanie o długość trwania."},{"en":"How long has she been working here?","ua":"Okres do teraz."}]},{"label":"O obecną albo niedawną aktywność","color":"blue","description":"Pytaj, czy ktoś był ostatnio albo jest teraz w jakimś procesie.","examples":[{"en":"Have you been studying all morning?","ua":"Proces może nadal trwać."},{"en":"Has he been sleeping well lately?","ua":"Niedawna powtarzająca się sytuacja."}]},{"label":"O widoczny rezultat","color":"amber","description":"Takie pytania często wyjaśniają obecny rezultat przez niedawny proces.","examples":[{"en":"Why are you tired? Have you been running?","ua":"Niedawny proces wyjaśnia rezultat teraz."},{"en":"Has she been crying?","ua":"Pytamy, bo coś widzimy teraz."}]}]}

{"title":"3. Pytanie i krótka odpowiedź","intro":"W odpowiedzi powtarzaj have / has, a nie całe zdanie.","rows":[{"en":"Have you been waiting long?","ua":"Yes, I have. / No, I haven't.","note":"have → have / haven't"},{"en":"Has she been working today?","ua":"Yes, she has. / No, she hasn't.","note":"has → has / hasn't"},{"en":"How long have they been living here?","ua":"For two years.","note":"pytanie o długość trwania"}],"warning":"Nie mów Has she been work? ani Yes, she have."}

{"title":"4. Typowe błędy","items":[{"label":"Błąd 1","color":"rose","title":"Stawianie have / has po podmiocie zamiast przed nim.","wrong":"❌ She has been working today?","right":"✅ Has she been working today?"},{"label":"Błąd 2","color":"amber","title":"Pomijanie been w pytaniu.","wrong":"❌ Have you studying long?","right":"✅ Have you been studying long?"},{"label":"Błąd 3","color":"sky","title":"Budowanie How long ze złym szykiem wyrazów.","wrong":"❌ How long you have been waiting?","right":"✅ How long have you been waiting?"}]}

{"title":"5. Krótkie podsumowanie","items":["Pytania w Present Perfect Continuous = Have / Has + subject + been + V-ing.","Używaj have z I / you / we / they.","Używaj has z he / she / it.","How long jest bardzo częste przy długości trwania do teraz.","W krótkich odpowiedziach powtarzaj have / has albo haven't / hasn't."]}

{"title":"Lekcje Present Perfect Continuous","items":[{"label":"Forma i użycie","url":"/pl/theory/present-perfect-continuous/present-perfect-continuous-forms","current":false},{"label":"Przeczenia","url":"/pl/theory/present-perfect-continuous/present-perfect-continuous-negatives","current":false},{"label":"Pytania i krótkie odpowiedzi","url":"/pl/theory/present-perfect-continuous/present-perfect-continuous-questions","current":true},{"label":"Określenia czasu","url":"/pl/theory/present-perfect-continuous/present-perfect-continuous-time-expressions","current":false}]}
